qa_pairs.question: What are the legacy architectures for which software can be found on specific pages?
qa_pairs.answer: Software for legacy architectures is available for AVX and SSE3.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find software for AVX legacy architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find software for AVX legacy architecture on the Modules_avx page.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find software for SSE3 legacy architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find software for SSE3 legacy architecture on the Modules_sse3 page.

qa_pairs.question: Which clusters utilize AVX512 architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: The clusters that utilize AVX512 architecture are Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, Trillium, Killarney, tamIA, and Vulcan.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster utilizes AVX2 architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: The Narval cluster utilizes AVX2 architecture.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find modules specific to AVX512 architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: Modules specific to AVX512 architecture can be found under the 'AVX512 (Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, Trillium, Killarney, tamIA, Vulcan)' tab.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find modules specific to AVX2 architecture?
qa_pairs.answer: Modules specific to AVX2 architecture can be found under the 'AVX2 (Narval)' tab.

qa_pairs.question: Where is most application software installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Most application software is installed in CVMFS.

qa_pairs.question: What is CVMFS?
qa_pairs.answer: CVMFS is a distributed file system.

qa_pairs.question: What is the advantage of using CVMFS for software installation?
qa_pairs.answer: CVMFS makes the central management of many software packages easier.

qa_pairs.question: Why are some software packages not installed in CVMFS?
qa_pairs.answer: Some software packages are not installed in CVMFS, usually due to license restrictions.

qa_pairs.question: Where are software packages not installed in CVMFS typically located?
qa_pairs.answer: Such packages are installed only at some sites or separately at each site.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the 'Site-specific software' section?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Site-specific software' section lists packages that are not installed in CVMFS but are installed locally at certain sites, often due to license restrictions.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of ADF (Amsterdam Density Functional Modeling Suite) are available on Nibi?
qa_pairs.answer: The available versions of ADF on Nibi are 2016.106, 2017.207, 2018.104, and 2019.305.

qa_pairs.question: What is ADF software used for?
qa_pairs.answer: ADF (Amsterdam Density Functional Modeling Suite) is computational chemistry software used for Amsterdam Density Functional Modeling.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers ADF software?
qa_pairs.answer: ADF software is available on the Nibi cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What version of AMS (Amsterdam Modeling Suite products) is available on Nibi?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 2020.102 of AMS is available on Nibi.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of AMS software?
qa_pairs.answer: AMS is software for Amsterdam Modeling Suite products.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers AMS software?
qa_pairs.answer: AMS software is available on the Nibi cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What version of AMBER (The Amber Molecular Dynamics Package) is available on Nibi?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 16 of AMBER is available on Nibi.

qa_pairs.question: What is AMBER software used for?
qa_pairs.answer: AMBER is The Amber Molecular Dynamics Package.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers AMBER software?
qa_pairs.answer: AMBER software is available on the Nibi cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of DIRAC are available on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: Versions 16.0 and 17.0 of DIRAC are available on Cedar.

qa_pairs.question: What is the DIRAC program used for?
qa_pairs.answer: The DIRAC program computes molecular properties using relativistic quantum chemical methods.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for the DIRAC program?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for the DIRAC program is http://diracprogram.org.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers the DIRAC program?
qa_pairs.answer: The DIRAC program is available on the Cedar cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What version of Galaxy is available on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 20.01 of Galaxy is available on Cedar.

qa_pairs.question: What is Galaxy software used for?
qa_pairs.answer: Galaxy is a scientific workflow, data integration, and data and analysis persistence and publishing platform designed to make computational biology accessible to research scientists.

qa_pairs.question: How can a group on Cedar get a Galaxy instance?
qa_pairs.answer: Any group on Cedar can have one Galaxy instance, run under a shared account, which will be created by admins. Users should contact technical support to set it up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for Galaxy?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for Galaxy is https://usegalaxy.org/.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers Galaxy software?
qa_pairs.answer: Galaxy software is available on the Cedar cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of Gaussian are available on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Nibi cluster, the available versions of Gaussian are g03.d01, g09.e01, g16.b01, and g16.c01.

qa_pairs.question: What versions of Gaussian are available on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Fir cluster, the available versions of Gaussian are g03.d01, g09.b01, g09.e01, g16.a03, g16.b01, and g16.c01.

qa_pairs.question: What is Gaussian software?
qa_pairs.answer: Gaussian is a general-purpose computational chemistry software package.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for Gaussian software?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for Gaussian software is http://gaussian.com/.

qa_pairs.question: What version of GBrowse is available on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 2.56 of GBrowse is available on Cedar.

qa_pairs.question: What is GBrowse used for?
qa_pairs.answer: GBrowse is a combination of database and interactive web pages for manipulating and displaying annotations on genomes.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for GBrowse?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for GBrowse is http://gmod.org/wiki/GBrowse.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers GBrowse software?
qa_pairs.answer: GBrowse software is available on the Cedar cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What version of SAS is available on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 9.4 of SAS is available on Cedar.

qa_pairs.question: What is SAS software used for?
qa_pairs.answer: SAS is a software suite developed by SAS Institute for advanced analytics, multivariate analyses, business intelligence, data management, and predictive analytics.

qa_pairs.question: Who is eligible to use SAS on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: SAS on Cedar is licensed software and it belongs to users from the Alberta School of Business who are eligible to run SAS.

qa_pairs.question: What is the homepage for SAS?
qa_pairs.answer: The homepage for SAS is https://www.sas.com/en_ca/home.html.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers SAS software?
qa_pairs.answer: SAS software is available on the Cedar cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What version of TPP (The Trans-Proteomic Pipeline) is available on Cedar?
qa_pairs.answer: Version 5.1.0 of TPP is available on Cedar.

qa_pairs.question: What is TPP (The Trans-Proteomic Pipeline) used for?
qa_pairs.answer: TPP is a collection of integrated tools for MS/MS proteomics.

qa_pairs.question: Can a web interface for TPP be provided?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, on Cedar, the TPP web interface (tpp_gui) can be provided per group upon user request.

qa_pairs.question: Which cluster offers TPP (The Trans-Proteomic Pipeline) software?
qa_pairs.answer: TPP (The Trans-Proteomic Pipeline) software is available on the Cedar cluster.
